overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street in Night City. The camera follows a character along an elevated roadway past towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by neon billboards and street lamps, with atmospheric fog and wet pavement reflections creating a moody, cinematic atmosphere typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban roadway with skyscraper views

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated roadway toward the illuminated city center, with tall buildings visible ahead through the fog

entered.detail: tall modern buildings with illuminated windows and large digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements
tall tower with multiple stacked digital screens showing changing neon advertisements
silver metal safety barrier running along the edge of the elevated walkway
tall black pole with bright overhead light cutting through the fog and rain
rain-soaked black pavement reflecting the street lights and neon signs

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy, rain-soaked night in a cyberpunk city. The camera follows a character walking along an elevated roadway, with towering glass skyscrapers and massive digital billboards visible through the haze on the left. A metal guardrail lines the right side of the path, while street lamps cast bright beams through the mist, illuminating the wet asphalt below.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated roadway with neon structures

events.description: first vehicle appears driving on the road to the right, headlights visible through the fog
road curves significantly causing the guardrail to shift from right to left side of frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved path, approaching a section with prominent purple neon lighting on the left while vehicles begin passing by

notable_agents.action: white van driving past on the wet road, headlights illuminating the fog

entered.detail: overhead structure adorned with vibrant purple and blue neon lights spanning across the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the road curves to the right, bringing a striking neon-lit structure into view on the left. The first vehicles begin appearing on the road, their headlights cutting through the fog. The guardrail shifts from the right to the left side of the frame as the path curves, while the massive skyscrapers remain visible ahead, now more centered in the view.

events.description: silver sedan drives past on the right side of the road
dark van passes by on the right, followed by other vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk as multiple vehicles pass by on the adjacent road, maintaining a consistent pace through the rain

notable_agents.action: dark colored van driving past with headlights on, creating reflections on the wet pavement

entered.detail: illuminated traffic signs with directional arrows mounted along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the elevated walkway with the guardrail now on the left. Several vehicles pass by on the right, their headlights and taillights reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement. Street lamps line the path at regular intervals, casting bright pools of light through the fog. The neon structures and billboards fade behind as the scene focuses on the steady flow of traffic and the illuminated road ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with pedestrian activity

events.description: first pedestrian becomes visible ahead on the sidewalk, standing near a traffic signal
character walks past the stationary pedestrian on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a pedestrian standing on the sidewalk, continuing toward the intersection with traffic signals visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person standing on the sidewalk near a traffic light, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: green neon sign reading 'NC PRISON' mounted on a building facade
white striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on the wet road surface
black pole with traffic signs and signals mounted at the intersection

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character approaches an intersection where a pedestrian stands near a traffic signal on the right. The camera passes the stationary figure as the green neon 'NC PRISON' sign becomes visible in the distance. Crosswalk markings appear on the wet pavement, and traffic signs indicate the approaching intersection. The atmosphere remains consistently foggy and rain-soaked, with street lamps continuing to illuminate the path forward through the dark city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked elevated roadway that transitions from a desolate, foggy vista of skyscrapers into a bustling urban intersection. It begins by following a character past towering glass buildings and massive digital billboards, with street lamps casting bright beams through a dense haze over the wet asphalt. As the road curves to the right, the perspective shifts to bring a striking neon-lit structure into view while the first vehicles appear, their headlights cutting through the mist. The scene then expands as the camera tracks alongside a steady flow of traffic, with the neon billboards fading into the background as headlights and taillights reflect off the slick pavement. Finally, the path leads toward a city intersection, passing a stationary pedestrian and crosswalk markings before revealing a green neon NC PRISON sign glowing in the distance.
